title: Establish the secure show-centered Studio contract

claims.statement: The current OSS quickstart launches Editor and Panel as separate applications and exposes channel as a query parameter for Panel and OBS.
The current Editor and Panel both use collection resources for saved compositions while production commands operate through channel-scoped scene activation.
Separating saved Scene source from Preview and Program snapshots removes ambiguous persistence and gives Editor, Production, OBS, and devices one command model.
The accepted product direction is local single-instance authentication rather than cloud multi-tenancy in the OSS repository.
The detailed interaction design for optional direct-to-Program mode will be resolved during its implementation change without weakening explicit target requirements.

successCriteria.statement: SPEC-0001 defines the accepted actors, domain terms, requirements, user stories, acceptance criteria, workflows, and exclusions for the Studio direction.
successCriteria.verification: Specification schema validation and semantic reference checks.

successCriteria.statement: The active profile selects ADR-0004 and SPEC-0001 so their hashes are present in the compiled GovernancePlan and manifest.
successCriteria.verification: Repository contract test and generated artifact comparison.

successCriteria.statement: The product contract distinguishes Show, Scene, Component Definition, Component Instance, Template, Preview, Program, Take, Control Definition, and Output.
successCriteria.verification: SPEC-0001 term registry and duplicate-ID validation.

successCriteria.statement: Security requirements separate Studio sessions, OBS output tokens, and device tokens while keeping multi-tenancy out of OSS scope.
successCriteria.verification: SPEC-0001 security requirements and out-of-scope assertions.

successCriteria.statement: Linux Stream Deck support is specified through the vendor-neutral Control API with Bitfocus Companion as the initial adapter.
successCriteria.verification: SPEC-0001 integration requirements and US-010 acceptance criteria.

definitionOfDone.statement: ADR-0004 and SPEC-0001 are accepted, immutable, selected by profile 2.0.0, and compile into the current plan.
Every user story has an actor, product surface, preconditions, outcome, and at least one observable acceptance criterion.
No product implementation files are changed by this contract-establishment change.
The complete workspace quality and build suites pass.
definitionOfDone.evidence: npm run check && npm run build
